articles.title: Police searching for tandem moped riders after shots fired in Roxbury
articles.description:
The suspects were seen riding a moped down Schuyler Street toward Elm Hill Avenue.

The post Police searching for tandem moped riders after shots fired in Roxbury appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Police are searching for moped riders involved in gunfire on Schuyler Street.
The suspects were last seen heading toward Elm Hill Avenue.
Residents are urged to stay vigilant following this incident in Roxbury.
